meaning: n.丹尼(Daniel 的昵称)(m.) n.<英方>手(尤用于与幼儿说话时)
examples: Some geezer called Danny did it.
She and Danny will drop by later.
"I spoke to Danny and am comfortable with what I said to him, " said Ashton.
In 2012 he appeared alongside Danny Devito in Neil Simon's The Sunshine Boys at London's Savoy Theatre.
